title: miliusa butonensis
intro: Miliusa butonensis, also known as Borneo milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Miliusa butonensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
